title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
